sections.location: The fire alarms are located downstairs above the door frames.
The circuit breaker is located on the wall downstairs near the laundry room.
The water shut off is located outdoor to the left of the stairs.
The electric meter is located around the exterior side of the house.
The thermostat is located downstairs near the laundry room.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
